formulas.latex: \left\{\begin{matrix} \left(\theta_{k , \left〈m , f\right〉}^{s} - 1\right) \times M < d_{\left〈m , f\right〉}^{s} - \overset{̃}{d}_{k}^{s} \\ \left(\theta_{k , \left〈m , f\right〉}^{s} - 1\right) \times M < a_{\left〈m , f\right〉}^{s} - \overset{̃}{a}_{k}^{s} \\ \left(\theta_{\left〈m , f\right〉 , k}^{s} - 1\right) \times M < \overset{̃}{d}_{k}^{s} - d_{\left〈m , f\right〉}^{s} \\ \left(\theta_{\left〈m , f\right〉 , k}^{s} - 1\right) \times M < \overset{̃}{a}_{k}^{s} - a_{\left〈m , f\right〉}^{s} \end{matrix}\right , \forall m \in P ; k \in K ; s \in E_{k} \cap E_{\left〈m , f\right〉}
